# Changelog 2026-06-17

# generated by why0712
# using ChatGpt tool.

## v1.0.0 - ALPHA

Initial public release.

### Features

- Meshtastic serial interface support
- Command-based interaction
- Ping command with RSSI and SNR reporting
- Time command
- Uptime command
- Node listing command
- Bot information command
- Command aliases:
  - admin
  - commands
  - list

### Logging

- Console logging
- File logging to meshbot.log
- RAW packet logging
- RX message logging
- TX message logging
- Command logging
- Node activity logging
- Error logging
- Startup/shutdown logging

### Improvements

- Cleaned code structure
- Removed monitoring subsystem
- GitHub-ready formatting

### Notes

- Designed for Raspberry Pi and Linux systems
- Compatible with Meshtastic Python API
- Uses serial connection to local radio node
